content:
谁将葬身异处？谁又将长眠故土？
命运落下了熟悉的判决，是黑底白字的讣告。
预知，照见了结局，却照不明灰蒙蒙的命途。
选择此刻的崩解，还是尽头的毁灭？

命运的主人，终究也是命运的奴仆……
作网自缚的囚徒，来不及哭或是笑，
手中的纺轮转动着，永不停歇。
「命运的囚笼里，我们都一无所有。」

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Who will be buried beneath a foreign sky?
Who in the soil of home shall forever lie?
Fate hands down its familiar verdict:
A white-on-black obituary, nothing more.
Prescience illuminates the end,
But leaves the grey and murky road unlit.
Shall we choose oblivion now,
Or devastation at the end?

The Master of Fate is its servant too...
A prisoner bound within her self-made web.
No time to weep, no time to laugh—
Still her hands turn the spindle, never to rest.
*"Within this cage of fate, we come with naught—
and naught is all we share."*

Generally speaking, a big reason that fanart is so appreciated is because it shows the creator's dedication towards the original source material. This is because fan work comes with the implicit understanding that it takes a significant amount of effort and time to create, independent of the objective quality or skill of the creator. This effort and time, being spent on fanart rather than other things in life, implies a love and dedication for the original source material which is a big contributor as to why other people appreciate it. AI, by virtue of not taking any time or any effort, shows none of that dedication and thus commands little respect from people who acknowledge a creator's time and effort. 

If the most you can do to show your appreciation of a work is to spend 4 seconds typing "grok, generate me an AI image of this character as a chibi", it shows that you don't really appreciate it much at all.
If one want to share a piece that is ai generated, it should at least say that it is up front.

I really like Arachne's design<:takenotes:1357186646294138890> If you use AI, at least indicate that you use it...<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>  it's not just about respecting other creators who make efforts but also for the characters themselves... We all know these good characters are designed by these efforts and original ideas<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

I appreciate creators that is why I spend as much money as I can afford, on this game. Anything else is your opinion unless server rules forbid ai generated images. If it is so, yeah, I would totally understand. But as of now, it's just your gatekeeping opinion

Also I guess it shouldn't be called art but rather just image, it do be the cold pixel amalgamation of a bunch of math

Sometimes, giving very little is considered to be much ruder than not giving at all

If you leave a 1 cent tip for a meal, it is considered far ruder than to give no tip at all, despite 1 cent being more than 0 cents

To draw an equivalent metaphor, the work and effort that artists and writers put into creating a character and design could be considered akin to the work that a highly regarded chef does in cooking a meal for you. Thus, a fanart equivalent would be sending the chef your homemade cookies afterwards to show your appreciation. Even if the cookies are bad, it at least demonstrates you cared enough to do so. AI would be the equivalent of sending the chef a frozen TV dinner afterwards. Even if it's technically more than not sending him anything at all, what you send doesn't exactly demonstrate either respect or appreciation for the work and effort he has put into what he served you.
The form of the actions you take have implications as to their meaning even if you didn't necessarily have those implications in mind to begin with

Let me explain how it works because I'm a bit tired of this attack. When a game is popular, you cannot avoid any form of fanart creation, because it's reality, in which we now live. Which, unfortunately, doesn't revolve around your opinion. More different fanart (even ai generated) - more popularity, more work for creator who work on the game. More recognition for them. Meanwhile you are trying to gatekeep me, new player who LOVE this game to bits, from sending cute chibi art generated by AI. Guess who damages the game more? And please stop thinking for other people. They might like that somebody who cannot draw, still love their character and try to make some meme with the source that they possess. That`s all I want to say. I cannot rewire your understanding through the 10 minutes chat. If officials decide to ban AI pics here, I will delete it and  will not post it ever. If not, it will remain your gatekeeping opinion.
